---
title: "My First Essay"
date: 2025-06-01
description: "One sentence shown in the listing and in link previews."
categories: [essay]
---

This is a placeholder post. Replace this text with your actual essay.

## Section heading

Write your content here in Markdown. You can include:

- Lists
- **Bold** and _italic_ text
- [Links](https://quarto.org)

> Blockquotes for pull quotes or citations.
